caption:
"We’re proud to highlight UIC alumnus Qusai Shikari, BS ‘08, MENGR, ‘16, during AAPI Heritage Month! As regional director of clinical technology at Kaiser Permanente, Qusai is using his deep experience to shape the future of medical tech.

A proud UIC grad with degrees in engineering and bioengineering, Qusai also volunteers on the UICAA alumni board, giving back to our community. 

Join us in celebrating his incredible contributions!

#AAPIHeritageMonth #UICAlumni #HealthcareInnovation #UICProud #UICAA".

caption:
"It's Research Week at Chicago's only public research university!

Celebrate the myriad ways UIC solves real-world problems through innovation and discovery at a series of events throughout the week, including UIC Impact Day, the Research and Scholarship Annual Awards and many more. See the full list of events at the link in our bio.

You can also participate in the #UICResearchMatters campaign by urging Congress to protect federal research funding at the link in our bio and by recording a 30-second video testimonial stating why research matters (video guidelines and submission form in bio).

#UICResearchWeek #ResearchWeek #ResearchMatters #UICResearch #UIC #ThisIsUIC".

caption:
"Know someone changing lives through compassion, innovation or service? 

Nominate them for the Dr. Tai R. Shin and Mrs. You H. Shin Humanitarian Award. This prestigious honor recognizes individuals making a lasting impact on humanity with $50,000 directed to a University of Illinois System program of their choice and a $5,000 personal award to share their story through a public lecture. Past recipients have advanced food security, hands-on education, and child protection. 

Nominations close April 18.

Help us spotlight those shaping a better world. Nominations close April 18. Learn more and submit at the link in bio. 

#UIC #ShinAward #UICProud #UICAlumni #HumanitarianAward".

caption:
"UIC alumna Suzet McKinney DRPH ‘09 was appointed to the University of Illinois Board of Trustees by Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker. McKinney is a true leader in the health sciences, most recently serving as principal and director of life sciences at Sterling Bay, where she led collaborations across the scientific, academic, corporate, technology and government sectors. 

She previously served as the CEO and executive director of the Illinois Medical District, overseeing a medical research hub, biotech incubator, hospitals and more than 40 health care facilities.

As McKinney puts her deep leadership experience to work in service of her new board position, she stands as a true representation of the 2025 Women’s History Month theme: Moving Forward Together: Women Educating & Inspiring Generations. 

#UICProud #WomensHistoryMonth #WomenWhoLead".

caption:
"Alumna Mili Isaza BS '23 became the role model she didn’t have. As an engineer at one of Chicago’s top engineering firms and a motivational youth speaker, Isaza shares her story of hope and resilience to inspire women and young girls to pursue STEM. 

Isaza grew up in Venezuela, where she faced hardships and viewed education as a way to improve her life. She graduated summa cum laude after 14 years of hard work and dedication. 

Her contributions to the engineering field embody the spirit of Women’s History Month. 

Click the link in our bio to read more about her story. 

#UICAA #WomenInSTEM #WomenInEngineering #CollegeOfEngineering #WomensHistoryMonth #UICAlumni #UICProud #UICExcellence #UICLeadership".

caption:
"Black history is an essential part of our collective history — living, evolving and shaping the world we share. As Black History Month comes to a close, the opportunity to learn, celebrate and uplift these stories continues daily.

Visit UIC’s award-winning Black Cultural Center for exhibitions, performances, film screenings, open-mic poetry, lectures, dance, storytelling and more, offering community and opportunities to expand your knowledge about race, culture and social justice in the United States and throughout the African Diaspora. 

Click the link in our bio to connect with UIC's Black Cultural Center.

#UICProud #BlackHistoryMonth #CelebrateBlackExcellence".

caption:
"Joshua Forrest, a student at UIC Law,  is using his legal education to fight for justice — advocating for prisoners’ rights, mentoring future Black lawyers and challenging a system that too often overlooks marginalized communities. A standout in his class, he excelled in moot court, earning Best Respondent and placing in the Thurgood Marshall Moot Court Competition. 

Now, through the Uptown People’s Law Center, he works on cases that defend civil rights and hold institutions accountable. Committed to changing the face of the legal profession, Forrest is ensuring that the law serves everyone — not just those it has historically favored.

#UICProud #BlackHistoryMonth #CelebrateBlackExcellence".
caption_raw:

caption:
"Sixty years ago today, Chicago Mayor Richard J. Daley cut the ribbon on UIC’s Circle Campus, opening the doors to a new era of public higher education in Chicago. Built on a 100-acre site at the crossroads of Greektown and Little Italy, Circle grew rapidly — transforming from 5,000 students in its first year to 18,000 within five years. 

It was a place of opportunity then, just as it is today.

Now, with 33,906 students across 16 colleges, UIC is the largest university in one of the world’s most vibrant cities. From a commuter campus named for a freeway interchange to a leading research institution, we’ve come a long way— thanks to the tens of thousands of alumni who have walked these elevated pathways and halls, shaping UIC’s legacy.

Here’s to the past, present, and future of UIC. See how far we’ve come.

#UIC #UICAlumni #UICTraditions #UICHistory #60thAnniversary #UICCircleCampus #CircleCampus #ChicagoArchitecture".

caption:
"Mariam Kamal BA '15  and Abdel Hamed BS '15 met at UIC through a mutual friend during their sophomore year. 

It was love at first sight while studying in the library for finals. After meeting, they discovered they were in the same biology classes and participated in the same student organizations. 

Six years later, they got married! Now, the couple lives in Round Lake Beach with their two children, Ayza, 5, and Ayman, 2. Mariam runs her own business, Kamaltech, Inc. and Abdel works in IT at a Veterans Affairs Medical Center.

#UIC #UICProud #ValentinesDay #UICAlumni #UICLoveStory".
caption_raw:

caption:
"As we celebrate Black History Month, we recognize the trailblazers shaping the future through advocacy, scholarship and policy. Marvin Slaughter BA ‘19 embodies this legacy, dedicating his career to advancing justice.

While at UIC, Slaughter co-founded the Student Advocacy Coalition, championing accessible higher education for all. Today, he continues this mission as a researcher at University of Chicago, focusing on economic stratification, intergenerational mobility and reparatory justice. 

This Black History Month, we honor changemakers like Slaughter, whose work ensures a more just future for generations to come.

Click the link in our bio to listen to Marvin Slaughter’s episode on the UIC Black Excellence Podcast. 

#BlackHistoryMonth #UIC #UICProud #UICAlumni #UICBlackLeaders #UICLeaders".

caption:
"Amanda Williams, BA '09, MEd '12, is breaking barriers and reshaping the transfer process for community college students. As executive director of student transfer success at City Colleges of Chicago, she’s expanding access to higher education — especially for underrepresented students.

Because of her leadership, the U of I System’s transfer guarantee now extends to more students nationwide, ensuring equitable opportunities. Williams' work embodies the spirit of Black History Month — uplifting communities and empowering future generations. 

Click the link in our bio to read more.

#BlackHistoryMonth #EducationEquity #StudentSuccess #UICAlumni #UIC #UICProud".

caption:
"Morningstar and the University of Illinois Chicago announced a $1M Design Fund, supporting scholarships and a faculty role bridging academia and design. 

Funded by Joe and Rika Mansueto and Morningstar, the initiative fosters design innovation, education and collaboration. This partnership empowers UIC students and deepens the connection between creativity and financial data.

#UICProud #UIC #UICAlumni #Morningstar #UICPartnership".
